posts.author: LunaVale94
posts.text: Hi everyone, just a quick update! Please note that I have updated my profile with new account help and payment details. You can find all the necessary information here [link removed]. Don't forget to check your messages for important updates on listings.
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting attempt as it asks users to visit an external link to obtain account help and payment details, which aligns with the Fraud category and warrants removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
